strategy.title: Collection Strategy
strategy.description: Select how data will be collected from the site
strategy.cssDescription: Collection via CSS selectors on the page HTML
strategy.apiDescription: Collection via direct API call to the site

cssConfig.title: CSS Selectors Configuration
cssConfig.description: Configure selectors to extract data from pages
cssConfig.jobDescriptionTooltip: Selector for the description on the detail page
cssConfig.requisitionIdTooltip: Selector for the unique job ID
cssConfig.requisitionIdAttributeTooltip: HTML attribute to extract the ID from (e.g. data-code). If empty, extracts visible text

apiConfig.title: API Configuration
apiConfig.jsonMappingTooltip: Defines the path to extract each data field from the API JSON response
apiConfig.paginationDelayTooltip: Milliseconds to wait between paginated requests to avoid rate limiting (429). E.g. 1500 = 1.5s
apiConfig.invalidJsonMappingError: Invalid JSON mapping — fix the field before saving.
